---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a bounded ChatPDM improvement
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: ''
assignees: SerhatSoruklu

---

## Summary

Short description of the capability or workflow you want to add or improve.

## What problem this solves

Describe the specific ChatPDM limitation, friction, or missing capability.

## Proposed change

Describe the exact behavior you want the system to have.

## Why this fits ChatPDM

Explain why this belongs inside the current deterministic, bounded contract.

## Current behavior

What ChatPDM does today instead.

## Scope and boundary

- What should change
- What should not change
- Whether this affects core concepts, registry-only terms, or UI only

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why they were not enough.

## Examples

Give one concrete example input, output, or workflow if relevant.

## Additional context

Logs, screenshots, reference concepts, or related issues.
